since_last: 85% of 99 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.90%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 85% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.77% · BTC +1.54% · Gold +1.48% · Nasdaq100 +1.63%. 85% of 99 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.90%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.90%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.93%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HPE is the standout at +9.46%
cards.body: Leaders: HPE +9.46%, ARM +8.97%, LRCX +5.98%, AMD +5.80%, FIX +5.80%. Laggards: AVAV -5.60%, IBM -2.52%, CRM -2.51%, PLTR -2.45%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.34% at $151.77
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.34% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
